body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Increase SLURM time for high resolution simulations on low process counts, preventing timeouts.
Plot scaling efficiency vs # of cols per process


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevent documentation.

-->
title: increase slurm time

body:
This PR:
 - Remaps weights less in the post processing script
 - Unifies `create_weightfile` with that used in the `remap_pipeline.jl`

I think the next step we may be able to make is to parallelize the remapping in the post processing scripts
title: Refactor remapping

body: This PR removes the use of `case` and `real_center_indices`
title: Remove use of `case` and `real_center_indices`

body: This PR adds the perf env init to the longrun pipeline, missed in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl/pull/1052
title: Add perf env init to LR pipeline

body: This PR unifies the dycore and edmf precipitation models
title: Unify grid mean and edmf precip models

body: This PR removes some unused auxiliary variables
title: Remove unused auxiliary variables

body: This PR removes some unused namelist parameters, since we're moving to the toml format, this hierarchical namelist needs to be phased out
title: Remove unused namelist parameters
